title: crataegus oxyacantha var. intermedia
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. intermedia, also known as Midway hawthorn, is a variety of hawthorn plant, which is a deciduous shrub or small tree with edible fruits and flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. intermedia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
